## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work, including any API ideas.

```python
# Example of how you imagine using the new feature
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context
Any references, links, or examples from other projects.
